NAME: QUOTES_IT_PIPE
DEFINITION:

FROM (

           $1:bx::NUMBER(3,0),

           $1:ax::NUMBER(3,0),
           $1:ap::FLOAT,

           $1:i::ARRAY,
           $1:t::NUMBER(20,0),
           $1:q::NUMBER(20,0),
           $1:z::NUMBER(3,0)
    FROM TABLE(DATA_SOURCE(TYPE => 'STREAMING'))
)
